title: Diamond Manager Scorer
author: bstrana
description: Live baseball scoring app with real-time scoreboard overlay for streaming. Tracks teams, rosters, score, counts, and game progress, and logs each plate appearance.
tagline: Live baseball scoring and streaming overlay

changelog.1.0.9: Fix Unknown team names: resolve homeTeamId/home_team_id, name/team_name, city/city_name field variants from scheduler payload.
changelog.1.0.8: Resolve team logo and color from multiple field name variants (logoUrl/logo_url/logo, primaryColor/color/team_color).
changelog.1.0.7: Remove sort param from schedule fetch; uppercase org_id filter to match DB casing.
changelog.1.0.6: Filter schedule list by logged-in user's org_id; client-side fallback handles alternate field names.
changelog.1.0.5: Remove sort=-updated from schedule list query; fixes 400 Bad Request from external scheduler collections.
changelog.1.0.4: Fix scheduler proxy: re-append /_pb path segment so PocketBase API requests route correctly.
changelog.1.0.3: Fix CORS/ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED on schedule fetch; add SCHEDULER_COLLECTION env var (default: published_schedules).
changelog.1.0.1: Add SCHEDULER_URL and SCHEDULER_ORG_ID env vars to connect to a separate Diamond Manager Scheduler app.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial Cloudron release with embedded PocketBase backend for persistent game states, scores, and plate appearances.
